title: Top Integrated Law Colleges in Noida
content: School of Law, Galgotias University’s five-year integrated B.A LL.B. (Hons.) aims to nurture legal professionals skilled in practical and procedural laws with critical thinking and analytical aptitude among students. This program is best suited for students with an inclination in social sciences, judiciary, UPSC, and other such competitive exams. At School of Law, Galgotias University legal education is meant for the development of society, solidarity and strengthening of rule of law as well as individual freedom. The programme enhances understanding across legal cultures to combat emerging issues under the globalisation module. XII with minimum 55% marks aggregate. Applicant with a valid score in AILET / CLAT/ CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) Score/Rank/Percentile will be given preference in Merit 01 Utilize comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge to meet the contemporary challenges. 02 Serve the society through their professional skills in advocacy, judicial and other legal services. 03 Handle legal issues cutting across boundaries covering substantive and procedural laws. 04 Exhibit legal excellence at international and domestic fora. 01 Possess the understanding and application of legal theories, Substantive and Procedural laws. 02 Demonstrate proficiency in legal research, reasoning and analysis. 03 Demonstrate proficiency in written and oral communication. 04 Gain knowledge of interface between law and social sciences and apply the same in their profession. 05 Develop mooting, counselling and negotiation skills. 06 Imbibe ethics to be demonstrated in professional setup. 07 Students shall serve the society through legal aid and legal awareness. 01 Utilize comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge in indigenous as well as foreign legal traditions, lawyering skills and research to meet the contemporary challenges. 02 Serve the society through their professional skills in advocacy, judicial and other legal services. 03 Handle legal issues cutting across boundaries covering domains such as Constitutional Laws, Criminal Laws, Corporate Laws and IPR Laws 04 Exhibit legal excellence at international and domestic fora. 01 Effectively contribute in the fields of substantive and procedural laws including interdisciplinary areas related to humanities. 02 Apply the knowledge and skills acquired through clinical & theoretical courses. 03 Demonstrate proficiency in written and oral communication. 04 Gain knowledge of interface between law and social sciences and apply the same in their profession. 05 Develop mooting, counselling, and negotiation skills. 06 Imbibe ethics to be demonstrated in professional setup. 07 Students shall serve the society through legal aid and legal awareness.
